steps.title: Contrast looks and knowledge
steps.content: The first sentence says the two volcanoes may look similar from afar. The second says volcanologists can tell they are different types based on formation.

steps.title: Choose the concession
steps.content: Choice A merely adds information, Choice B signals a result, and Choice C gives an example. The sentence instead needs a concessive contrast: despite the visual similarity, experts can distinguish the volcanoes. The answer is D.
